title: Record soft22 handoff24 and tool1.2k densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft22 Handoff24 Tool12k Contract

## Soft 22
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.22 with quality bias floor 0.20 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Handoff 24
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.24 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Tool 1.2k
tool result budgets default to 1200 chars with 20-char previews; Grep head defaults to 100 for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status vitest
